NAME
    Register-PnPEntraIDAppForInteractiveLogin
    
SYNOPSIS
    Registers an Entra ID App for use with Interactive login
    
    
    --------- EXAMPLE 1 ---------
    
    ```powershell
    Register-PnPEntraIDAppForInteractiveLogin -ApplicationName TestApp -Tenant 
    yourtenant.onmicrosoft.com
    ```
    Creates a new Entra ID Application registration. The application will be 
    setup with the following delegate permissions to consent: 
    AllSites.FullControl, Group.ReadWrite.All, User.ReadWrite.All, 
    TermStore.ReadWrite.All. A browser window will be shown allowing you to 
    authenticate.
    
     --------- EXAMPLE 2 ---------
    
    ```powershell
    Register-PnPEntraIDAppForInteractiveLogin -ApplicationName TestApp -Tenant 
    yourtenant.onmicrosoft.com -GraphDelegatePermissions "Group.Read.All" 
    -SharePointDelegatePermissions "AllSites.FullControl"
    ```
    Creates a new Entra ID Application registration. The application will be 
    setup with the following delegate permissions to consent: Group.Read.All, 
    AllSites.FullControl. A browser window will be shown allowing you to 
    authenticate.

{"command":"$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; Import-Module PnP.PowerShell; Register-PnPEntraIDAppForInteractiveLogin -ApplicationName 'PnP PowerShell Agent Local' -Tenant 'tenanttocheck.onmicrosoft.com' -DeviceLogin -SharePointDelegatePermissions 'AllSites.Read'","explanation":"Register a tenant-local Entra app for delegated interactive PnP.PowerShell login using device-code authentication and minimal SharePoint read permission.","goal":"Register PnP Entra app","mode":"sync","timeout":300000}
